subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of His honor A.L., upon him be the Glory of God, hath come before Our presence. We have hearkened unto his call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد علیک بهائی نامه جناب ع ل علیه بهاء الله تلقاء وجه حاضر انا سمعنا ندائه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort
